case_title: CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. FAUSTO GALLARDO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARDO, FAUSTO INDIVIDUALLY  & AS PARTNERS,DBA GALLARDO'S MEXICAN RESTAURANT GALLARDO, JUAN MAUNEL INDIVIDUALLY AS PARTNERS, DBA GALLARDO'S MEXICAN RESTAURANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR MANUEL INDIVIDUALLY & AS PARTNERS, DBA GALLARDO 'S MEXICAN RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLARDO, FAUSTO INDIVIDUALLY  & AS PARTNERS,DBA GALLARDO'S MEXICAN RESTAURANT GALLARDO, JUAN MAUNEL INDIVIDUALLY AS PARTNERS, DBA GALLARDO'S MEXICAN RESTAURANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR MANUEL INDIVIDUALLY & AS PARTNERS, DBA GALLARDO 'S MEXICAN RESTAURANT $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
